message:
fix: close hooked bead regardless of status in gt done (gt-pftz)

Previously, updateAgentStateOnDone only closed the hooked bead when its
status was exactly "hooked". Polecats update their work bead to
in_progress during work, so the exact-match check skipped closing.
After the hook was cleared, the bead appeared as unassigned open work,
causing the deacon to re-dispatch — creating infinite dispatch loops.

Fix: use !IsTerminal() instead of == StatusHooked, so beads in any
non-terminal status (hooked, in_progress, open, blocked) are closed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
